title: alpinia sumatrana
intro: Alpinia sumatrana, also known as the Sumatran ginger or lesser galangal, is a type of perennial plant belonging to the ginger family (Zingiberaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Alpinia sumatrana include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and provide relief from respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Alpinia sumatrana can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and powders, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
